prompt: A pixel-perfect macOS application window mockup for the 'Canvas' view of an AI image viewer called 'ImageView'. Background #08080c. All monospace text. TOP BAR: traffic lights, centered tabs with 'canvas' having green #9ece6a underline. No sidebar. MAIN AREA: an infinite spatial canvas on pure black background. Several AI-generated images are freely placed at different positions and sizes — some overlapping slightly. A group of 4 portrait images is outlined with a dashed green #9ece6a rectangle showing they are grouped, with label 'portraits v2' in small monospace text. Thin gray #1a1a2e arrows connect some images showing iteration relationships. One image has a blue #7aa2f7 border (focused). Small zoom indicator in bottom-right: '45%'. The canvas feels like Figma or Miro but with terminal aesthetics. BOTTOM STATUS BAR: 'CANVAS | 23 images | 2 groups | [drag] place [g] group [arrow] connect [scroll] zoom'. Dark, minimal, spatial.
